name: MSSQL XPCmdshell Suspicious Execution
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: MSSQL XPCmdshell Suspicious Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects when the MSSQL "xp_cmdshell" stored procedure is used to execute commands

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mssql%' AND "Event ID"=33205 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%object_name:xp_cmdshell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%statement:exec%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MSSQL XPCmdshell Suspicious Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mssql%' AND "Event ID"=33205 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%object_name:xp_cmdshell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%statement:exec%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MSSQL XPCmdshell Suspicious Execution
